download_docx.title: Download DOCX
download_docx.description: Public URL to download the generated CV as a Microsoft Word (.docx) file.

download_pdf.title: Download PDF
download_pdf.description: Public URL to download the generated CV as a PDF file.

tables.title: Extracted Data Tables
tables.description: Object mapping each detected document type (e.g. id_card, diploma, transcript, certificate) to a public URL for its CSV file.

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.description: AI-generated professional profile summary paragraph, produced by Cloudflare Workers AI from the extracted document data. Empty string if useProfileTransformer is false.

pagesProcessed.title: Pages Processed
pagesProcessed.description: Total number of pages or images processed by the OCR engine.

documentsDetected.title: Document Types Detected
documentsDetected.description: List of document type keys detected across all uploaded files (e.g. ['id_card', 'diploma', 'transcript']).

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run completed.

auditHash.title: Audit Hash
auditHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the extracted text content combined with the timestamp, for audit trail purposes.
